name: In-situ Heating-Stage EBSD Validation of Algorithms for Prior-Austenite Grain Reconstruction in Steel
data_types: EBSD CTF frames; TIFF; GIF; thermocouple; dilatometry
notes: Strong validation dataset because it includes high-temperature parent reference and transformed states.

name: Prior Austenite Grain Measurement supplementary material
data_types: EBSD; SE images; grain-size lists; EDS; microhardness; Thermo-Calc predictions
notes: Useful for comparing reconstructed PAG with direct/etched measurements.

name: MTEX martensite parent grain reconstruction example
notes: Benchmark for parent-grain reconstruction logic and OR refinement.

name: MTEX parent grain reconstruction JAC paper examples
notes: Describes graph-level parent reconstruction, OR refinement, and example applications.

name: ORTools4MTEX
data_types: OR discovery; OR analysis; plotting; MTEX functions
notes: Useful validation/comparator for OR analysis and reporting.

name: Cayron NiTi EBSD/TKD B2-B19prime paper
data_types: EBSD/TKD analysis figures; ORs; habit-plane interpretation
notes: Core scientific source for NiTi natural OR, B2 parent reconstruction and habit-plane logic.

name: orix-data
notes: Useful for testing orientation-map IO; not necessarily martensite-specific.

name: kikuchipy documentation/examples
notes: Pattern analysis layer; not enough alone for parent reconstruction.

name: OpenPhase martensite/bainite framework
notes: Physics simulation layer; not data source by itself.

name: DAMASK
notes: Mechanics connector for variant selection/property modeling.

name: pycalphad
notes: Thermodynamics connector; needs suitable thermodynamic databases.
